Boosts rover endurance by optimizing solar panel alignment.
Design a dashboard into "dashboard-football" frame with a table ranking UEFA teams. Show goal counts, captain name, etc. Put stats on the top.
Design a dashboard into "dashboard-revenue" frame for a revenue tracking app with a sidebar, showing revenue stats, history in the content.
Design a dashboard with a sidebar on the left into "dashboard-utility" frame for a utility company showing current usage and a history in a table.
